name: Sunday Sea Two Pool Villa Pattaya
detail: Sea two pool villa is an excellent choice for the wary traveler looking unwind in a secluded establishment. Since Pattaya's beach is not as attractive as it once was, the next best option is an all in one resort in Pattaya. Location-wise it is off the city centre and there are basically zero shops for food or shopping nearby (closest is about 10 minutes by car/motorbike, pattaya floating market). But what it makes up with is its facilities and amenities. With private dipping pool with jets, outdoor shower, spacious villa and the common facilities such as the gym, a restaurant, a bar area and a common pool, sea two pool villa is a great, budget-friendly getaway resort. One complain though other then its location (which you can easily make up by renting a vehicle or motorbike), is its service. The room cleaning services is slow in response even though we requested only for a change of towels without the need for room cleaning. Apart from that I think i can add a new weekend resort getaway to my list.

name: Sunday Grand Jomtien Pattaya
detail: Came in for business and this place did its job well.

name: Pooh Beach Resort & Spa
detail: I had a very enjoyable stay and I will come back again soon.

name: March Hotel
detail: March hotel is a brand new property which provides you with best in class amenities within affordable price. I booked this hotel from Agoda with expectations of getting a class facility similar to April and August suites as the owner is same - and the hotel exceeded my expectations - I have previously stayed in April suites also so I trusted this new property - really they kept my trust. This hotel is managed, staffed and maintained to the highest degree and is excellent value for money. It is Located near to Tops supermarket( Central Pattaya) in a quiet street (very common in Thailand provincial towns), but the nightlife is only 3-4 minutes away. This may not be a 5 start luxury hotel but the interior design, decoration and layout makes it a very comfortable stay. The balcony is big, the fridge is big, the pool is well designed - in short it is much better than many of the 4 star establishments in Pattaya and elsewhere. I stayed with my 4 friends and one couple - all of them may not be free to write a review but on their behalf too it was rated the best value for money hotel. The receptionist Miss Julia took great care for all of us - she is very polite and caring. We started our stay very next day of the Grand opening of the hotel and I am sure the standards will be maintained in the coming years too. To close this review at last I would like to add - I really enjoyed my stay here, believe me and you will also.

name: April Suites Pattaya
detail: i had called ahead to confirm my reservation and ask a few questions and the people who answered the phone all spoke very good English and before i even arrived i had a good impression of the place. easy to get too, the hotel is right off of Pattaya Klang/Central Pattaya Road and it only took 10 minutes to get to from the bus terminal on North Pattaya Road/Pattaya Nuea by motorcycle taxi (50 Baht fare) and it is 10 min walk to Beach Road. April Suites was recommended to me by a friend and upon arrival i was pleasantly surprised to see that it was exactly like the photos on the website, even better. check in was fast and trouble free, they had all the paper work started prior to my arrival and i was in my room relaxing within 10 minutes. the hotel is fairly new & everything was in perfect shape, the room is sensibly & beautifully furnished, THE BED IS FANTASTIC, bathrooms are well laid out & i had hot water & good pressure on demand at all times which is not always the case in Pattaya hotels. the room has a big flat screen TV, an OK sized desk/work area & the WiFi was never a problem (not super fast, but i was always able to work with ease). it is one of the only rooms i have stayed in anywhere, at any price, that has enough electrical outlets, in all the right places & they were grounded. for a business traveler with a computer this is a big plus. one of the best features of the hotel is the nice quiet roof-top pool area. great sofa beds & umbrellas, the area & the pool itself are spotlessly clean & the staff are attentive & once again, speak great English. there is a small but decent gym & a fantastic, clean, HOT sauna. the few times i ordered drinks they came quickly & are not overpriced. i did not try the food so i cannot comment. there is a large frig & you can stock it by going to the Tops Market located on the corner to across Pattaya Sai 2. i have stayed in every room type & all are good & spacious & the suite room was like a smal

name: Acqua Hotel
detail: My first time staying Acqua and I was really impressed by this hotel. First, the staff are some of the friendliest people around. Can't say more how much they were super helpful of anything I needed. The rooms aren't all that big but they are super comfortable and was always kept clean. The balcony was sufficient. The interesting thing is that the showers can be seen from the outside. I guess if you don't mind then don't put the blinds down, I didn't. The rooftop pool is absolutely gorgeous and I would recommend for people to take advantage of it. If you are looking for location around central Pattaya then this is one of the best places to stay in. There are many places around that will catch your attention. I won't ruin it, but stay at this hotel and you will see. I would definitely recommend this hotel for anyone. Would stay here in again for future visits to Pattaya.

name: Shilat Avenue Pattaya
detail: Very clean and modern rooms, great staff and great location.

name: Nonze Hostel
detail: On my conquest of travelling around the world, having visited Pattaya multiple times, this is the hotel that stands out, being a hotel that deserves recognition and writing a review for. If I could, I would rate it a 5 star hostel, not a 2.5 star like humbly mentioned. It really exceeds my expectation. I believe that everyone who visits Pattaya for the first time should visit, you will not regret it and will definitely come back to visit again. Trust me, I’ve been there. My experience: I came to this location through google maps, but the sign is easily noticeable and you will appreciate it as it is just next to a large department store in the area; Royal Garden - I find it very valuable for a small hostel to be so easy to navigate to in the busy streets, and the convience of being able to get everything just nearby. My friends and I usually have the problem where, early in the morning, the quality restaurants are not yet opened and the street food are believed to be unclean. This hostel is just above a McDonalds which is open for 24hrs, so it solved all our problem concerning food :) We came here late at night so we did not see the view of the sea that clearly, but in the morning, we saw the sun rise just above the sea and I find that an experience to share. It is a must see for everyone who comes to pattaya. Before I booked, I checked the relative prices of nearby hotels which is much more expensive for a single room, but the reason I chose this hostel is because it is newly opened, fingers crossed as I booked, turns out a choice worth the risk and unbelievably clean! Do you understand the feeling of a new hotel, where everything from the toilet seats are brand new, white and clean! This is exactly my experience. The attention to detail is all cared for, clean new beds and pillows! Last but not least, the Wi-Fi, so damn fast, so speedy. Almost no delay in streaming Euro 2016.
area: Pattaya Beach Road,Pattaya - View on map

name: Bella Express Hotel
detail: I have stayed many hotels in Pattaya. Bella Express Hotel is best among all. Best location for tourist and Value of Money. Friendly and co-operative staff.

name: Hotel Amber Pattaya
detail: For a 4 star hotel you are not going to get anything better!!! A brand new hotel that is immaculate, gym, sauna, nice pool area and a great room. We had a Superior room with a queen bed that was so comfortable. Buffet breakfast was nice with plenty of options English, Thai and Indian. Location is perfect, on a quieter street set back a little but walk 2 mins up the street and you are right in mix for bars and everything Pattaya offers. Price point was fantastic value for money. You can not go wrong staying athe Hotel Amber.
